description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a white picket fence, featuring a rectangular main building with two stories and a flat roof. The front facade has a covered porch area, large windows with shutters, and a central entrance. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool with lounge chairs and an umbrella, as well as a covered outdoor seating area with a pergola. There are a few trees and patches of grass within the fenced yard, adding greenery to the property. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan color with white trim, and the overall design is clean and contemporary. The layout is open and inviting, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, white picket fence, pool, and outdoor lounge area, featuring large windows and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, pool, lounge chairs, and pergola seating area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facade, upper story windows, and fenced yard with a tree and green patch.
description_view_2: Opposite end view displaying the back entrance, pool, umbrella, and a tree in the corner of the yard.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, multiple windows, pool, and the white fence enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
